headlines.title: Trump calls Iran response to US proposal to end war 'totally unacceptable'
headlines.summary: Iran demands lifting of US naval blockade, recognition of sovereignty over Strait of Hormuz, and compensation for war damage.

headlines.title: US and French nationals test positive for hantavirus after cruise ship evacuation
headlines.summary: American national arrived in Nebraska, French woman isolating in Paris after outbreak on cruise ship near Canary Islands.

headlines.title: Bosnia's powerful peace envoy quits, with questions over role's future
headlines.summary: Christian Schmidt departs after appearing to lose backing of the United States; had been in role since 2021.

headlines.title: Philippine VP Sara Duterte impeached for a second time
headlines.summary: If convicted in Senate trial, she will be disqualified from running for president.

headlines.title: Ailing Iranian Nobel laureate Narges Mohammadi granted bail and hospital transfer
headlines.summary: Human rights activist granted bail amid growing concern over her poor health in prison.

headlines.title: Trump and China's Xi set for talks spanning Iran, nuclear, trade and AI
headlines.summary: Leaders to discuss extending critical minerals deal; meeting comes as China signals being 'locked and loaded' for economic fight.

headlines.title: Israel escalates attacks on Lebanon, unraveling truce with Hezbollah
headlines.summary: IDF conducted airstrikes targeting Hezbollah infrastructure; over 150 Hezbollah operatives reported killed in recent strikes.

headlines.title: Strait of Hormuz closure poses severe threat to global oil supply and China's economy
headlines.summary: Fifth of world's oil traditionally flows through strait; closure impacts global energy markets and Gulf relationships.

headlines.title: Abe Foxman, longtime head of Anti-Defamation League, dies at 86
headlines.summary: Advocate for American Jews led ADL for decades; notable death in civil rights community.

headlines.title: Remains of US soldier missing during military exercises in Morocco recovered
headlines.summary: Soldier who went missing during exercises has been recovered; details being gathered by authorities.
